items.title: Diana Chan McNally: Bringing community work to Toronto’s City Council
items.summary:
Community worker and homelessness advocate Diana Chan McNally discusses her campaign for City Councillor of Parkdale-High Park in Toronto’s October 26th municipal elections. 
 The post  Diana Chan McNally: Bringing community work to Toronto’s City Council  appeared first on  rabble.ca .
